overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit night market and industrial bazaar. The scene features dense crowds, futuristic car displays, hanging industrial machinery, and multiple levels connected by staircases in a gritty cyberpunk setting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market past futuristic car displays and scattered crowds

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking ahead of the camera
pedestrian in orange shirt standing near market stall

entered.detail: large industrial banner with white text on dark background
massive yellow industrial crane arm extending across the ceiling
raised platform with glowing yellow edge lighting displaying vehicles
lime green futuristic sports car with hood open on display
purple-blue sports car with hood open next to the green car
illuminated advertising screen with red and white graphics

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious underground market dominated by a massive yellow crane structure overhead. Two futuristic sports cars sit on illuminated display platforms while pedestrians browse nearby stalls. The environment features industrial metal beams and glowing neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial transition area with concrete staircase

events.description: turns left away from car display area toward industrial staircase
begins ascending concrete staircase with red edge lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left and climbing the first staircase toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: NPC in dark clothing descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: stacked red and blue metal shipping containers with graffiti
wide concrete staircase with red illuminated edges leading upward
market stall with traditional red paper lanterns visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower industrial area with stacked shipping containers and begins ascending a concrete staircase illuminated by red lighting along the edges. A food stall with red lanterns becomes visible at the top of the stairs as the character climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level market walkway with hanging mech

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters upper market area with food stalls
passes under large hanging mechanical structure suspended from ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper market level past food stalls and under a massive hanging mech

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall with red paper lanterns
pedestrian with white hair walking ahead under the mech

entered.detail: open concrete platform area at the top of the stairs
massive yellow industrial robot or mech suspended from ceiling with cables
multiple illuminated advertising screens with various colors

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper walkway, the character passes a food stall with glowing red lanterns and walks beneath a massive yellow industrial mech hanging from the ceiling. The area is lined with neon billboards and market stalls while pedestrians move through the space.

events.description: ascending second staircase with red neon lighting on sides
enters narrow corridor with butcher shop and glowing neon signs

agents.ego_description: climbing the second staircase and proceeding through the narrow upper corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the narrow corridor

entered.detail: second staircase with red illuminated strips along the edges
red neon sign reading 'BUTCHER' above a shop entrance
confined walkway with metal walls and overhead pipes
industrial piping and ductwork running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character climbs a second staircase with red lighting and enters a narrow, enclosed corridor featuring a butcher shop with a prominent red neon sign. The walkway is lined with industrial pipes and metal grating while various neon advertisements illuminate the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sprawling underground bazaar that transitions from a wide industrial plaza into a series of narrow, elevated corridors. It begins in a spacious market beneath a massive yellow crane, moving past illuminated sports car displays and glowing neon advertisements. As the camera turns left, the open space gives way to a tighter industrial zone of stacked shipping containers, leading the viewer up a concrete staircase accented by red lighting. The scene then expands onto an upper walkway, passing under a hanging industrial mech and red lanterns before ascending a second red-lit staircase. Finally, the path narrows into an enclosed corridor of metal grating and industrial pipes, ending beside a butcher shop marked by a prominent red neon sign.
